programme.title: 🌊 1.2m @ 8s CROSS
programme.desc:
The 1.2m swell and crosswind suggest a day for perfecting my duck diving technique.

programme.title: 🌊 0.9m @ 8s CROSS
programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 0.9m @ 8s CROSS
programme.desc:

programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 0.9m @ 8s OFFSHORE
programme.desc:
At 0.9m, it'll be rideable, but I've seen dishwashers with more push, and that offshore might just keep the spray out of my eyes.
🌊 Swell: 0.9m @ 8s 💨 Wind: 23.0km/h SSE (OFFSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 38.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.8m

programme.title: 🌊 0.9m @ 8s OFFSHORE
programme.desc:
With 0.9m and offshore wind, you'll find something rideable; just don't expect barrels for the highlight reel.
🌊 Swell: 0.9m @ 8s 💨 Wind: 23.0km/h SSE (OFFSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 38.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.8m

That 2.3m swell with the offshore might be just rideable, if you enjoy battling chop.
🌊 Swell: 2.3m @ 8s 💨 Wind: 23.0km/h SSW (OFFSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 46.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 1.2m
📋 Clean conditions with offshore wind

programme.title: 🌊 2.6m @ 9s CROSS
programme.desc:

programme.title: 💨 2.1m @ 9s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
With 2.1m of onshore slop, today is best spent watching someone else get washed onto the beach.
🌊 Swell: 2.1m @ 9s 💨 Wind: 34.0km/h SSW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 60.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 1.7m
